title: Eligible - Healthcare Eligibility and Claims API
problem: Healthcare providers and digital health companies need simple APIs for insurance eligibility verification and claims processing.
solution: API platform for healthcare transactions. Real-time eligibility verification, claims submission, payment estimation, and more. Developer-first approach to healthcare data.
varden_fit: HIGH — Eligible's API-first model proves developers want healthcare transaction APIs. European digital health needs equivalent.
notes: CONTRARIAN: API-first eligibility is the modern approach. European digital health platforms lack reliable eligibility APIs.
